calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am, Dept. 525, Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, clerk-beth wilber:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Appellant, Daniel Levi, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Arcon Construction, represented by Gladimer Lieov, appears through counsel, Ronald Losch. Appearing with Mr. Levi is Rena Levi (wife). Parties are sworn. Mr. Levi and Ms. Levi testify in the narrative. Though evidence is exchanged and viewed by the Court, no new evidence is identified or retained by the Court.
10:25am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Judgment Entered
